name: Joseon Dynasty
note: Founded by Yi Seong-gye; shifted from Buddhist to Neo-Confucian ideology. Known for its stable bureaucracy and the invention of Hangul.

figures.name: Sejong the Great
figures.significance: Commissioned the creation of Hangul; oversaw a scientific and cultural golden age.

figures.name: Yi Sun-sin
figures.significance: Admiral who saved Joseon from Japanese invasion (Imjin War) through naval brilliance and the turtle ship.
